svg.aria-label: nox-mem hybrid retrieval architecture: markdown and entity files ingest into a chunks table with FTS5 BM25 lexical search and Gemini 3072 dimensional vector search, fused via RRF k equals 60, salience boosted by recency pain and importance, served through the hybrid search HTTP API. Light theme.
svg.title: nox-mem — Hybrid Retrieval Architecture
svg.text: BM25 lexical + Gemini 3072d semantic, fused with RRF, ranked by salience
nox-mem · hybrid memory with shadow discipline
